description_long: This is a large, two-story residential house set within a fenced property, featuring a main building with a prominent turret, multiple gabled and hipped roof sections, and a detached garage. The house is surrounded by a landscaped garden with various trees, shrubs, and paved walkways, as well as a driveway leading to the garage. The exterior walls are primarily brick with large, multi-pane windows distributed asymmetrically across the facade. The main entrance is marked by a wide, paved path, flanked by decorative trees and a small porch area. The property includes a backyard area with additional landscaping and what appears to be a small patio or seating area. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, with a focus on spaciousness and curb appeal.
description: A spacious two-story brick house with a turret, gabled roofs, and a detached garage, set in a landscaped, fenced property with paved paths and lush gardens.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, turret, wide paved walkway, and decorative trees leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, detached garage, and backyard landscaping with a patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, additional garden features, and the garage from a different angle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the garden, side entrance, and the arrangement of trees and shrubs around the property.
attribute_roof_type: hip with turret and gable sections
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large multi-pane windows and bay windows
attribute_entryway_design: Wide paved entry path, small porch, decorative trees, and a prominent main door with steps
